---
title: "project"
format: html
---
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r}
DonorHyperglycemia <- read_csv("DonorHyperglycemia.csv")
```


Log Regression Test with TWA and predictors gender, bmi, age:
```{r}
m1 <- glm(delayed_fn ~ r_genderf + r_bmi + r_age,
          data = DonorHyperglycemia,
          family = "binomial") 

summary(m1)
```
